# CalcHeure: heurejour.com

CalcHeure is a free French-language time and calculation tool suite, designed for employees, freelancers, and HR professionals.

## Tools
- Work hours calculator (with midnight crossing support for night shifts)
- Minutes-to-hours converter
- Hourly salary calculator
- Date difference calculator
- Online timer
- Attendance sheet generator
- Percentage calculator (increase, decrease, ratio, evolution)

## Content
- French-language blog covering time management, payroll calculation, and productivity
- Each tool page includes formulas, worked examples, and FAQ sections

## Audience
French-speaking workers, freelancers, and HR teams seeking fast, accurate time and salary calculations.

## Technical
- Static site deployed on Vercel
- SEO-optimized pages with schema markup (WebApplication, FAQPage)
- No login required — all tools run client-side in the browser
